nodes.speaker: ShipMarket
lines: Tumbling Bean — her spin walks old expedition junk down to the gentle spots once an orbit, like a tide. Thrusters, dishes, panels. Some of it still holds a serial number.

responses.buttonText: And you'll buy whatever I haul back.

nodes.speaker: ShipMarket
lines: Old ones. Pre-withdrawal. People used to go out there, friend — the outer system used to have traffic, patrols, schedules.
Then it had reasons instead. Now it has salvage.

nodes.speaker: ShipMarket
lines: Standard salvage rates, plus a finder's bonus for anything with a serial older than me.
Watch your footing out there. The Bean doesn't have a down. First-timers usually give her one anyway — headfirst.
